visualRegression.coverageNote: Capture branded public/admin areas when visual smoke is run; do not update baselines without human review.

contentOverflow.coverageNote: Responsive smoke should fail on unintended horizontal scrolling, clipped labels, or overflowing card/form text.

publicLinkChecks.coverageNote: Public smoke should verify internal nav/footer links resolve without branded 404s unless intentionally unknown.

publicImageChecks.coverageNote: Public smoke should scan rendered images for broken natural dimensions and missing required alt text where applicable.

emailTemplateSnapshots.coverageNote: Snapshot stable subject/body payload shape while avoiding live provider sends.

paymentPayloadSnapshots.notApplicableReason: No online payment provider payloads in this site.

auditLogReadability.coverageNote: Admin audit/history surfaces should show plain-language action summaries without hiding raw diagnostics.

fixtureCleanup.coverageNote: Tests and dev verifiers that create durable records should own cleanup or mark records clearly as test fixtures.

apiResponseShape.coverageNote: Admin dashboard/API tests should assert stable response keys, empty-state arrays, and safe error shapes without relying on production data.

adminNavigationContract.notApplicableReason: Shared cPanel admin navigation contract does not apply to this non-cPanel site.

bundleBudgetTrend.coverageNote: Track trend deltas in CI/local verify; intentional increases should be reviewed with the feature that caused them.

adminColorContrast.coverageNote: Admin smoke should catch low-contrast cards, disabled buttons, badges, and status panels, especially after shared-kit updates.

themeMode.assertion: This site intentionally ships one branded theme unless a future feature explicitly adds dark/light/system switching.
themeMode.coverageNote: Smoke tests should verify the branded theme is applied consistently and no accidental OS color-scheme inversion breaks readability.

environmentCompleteness.coverageNote: Production deploy packaging must use the manifest env contract and avoid local-only env files.

newRepoOnboarding.coverageNote: New deployable repos should not be considered onboarded until deploy, smoke, test-hardening, metadata, CI, and security-gate docs exist.

productionReadinessScorecard.reviewCadence: before each production deploy or launch approval
productionReadinessScorecard.coverageNote: Use the deploy/smoke manifests as the site readiness scorecard before release.

liveMonitoring.reviewCadence: after each deploy and during weekly read-only audit automation
liveMonitoring.coverageNote: Monitoring is read-only: check health, admin diagnostics, CDN/cache state, and CI/security status without mutating live data.
